Checked and verified: EPIC-655 is already implemented in the current EpicZone codebase.

What I found
- src/routes/login.tsx already renders the login button with variant='purple'
- src/components/button/AppButton.tsx defines purple as:
  - bg-purple-500
  - text-white
  - hover:bg-purple-600
- src/routes/login.spec.tsx already asserts the purple Tailwind styling

Verification
- Ran:
  corepack pnpm vitest run src/routes/login.spec.tsx
- Result:
  1 test passed

Relevant history
- Existing commit already in history:
  6eb8f1e7 fix: make login button purple

Net result
- No code changes were needed
- No PR was created because there is nothing new to commit

If you want, I can next:
1. update the Linear issue with “already implemented”
2. double-check the actual rendered login page in-browser/e2e
3. clean up the temporary branch I created for verification
